problem id: bb429016
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  00000001 -> 11110101
  10011011 -> 00010001
  10000000 -> 11111111
  01110000 -> 10011111
  01010100 -> 11110111
  10010110 -> 01100011
  01101011 -> 01110001
  10001001 -> 10100101
  00000000 -> 11111111

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 00101111
